nasb.text: He will bring back on you all the diseases of Egypt of which you were afraid, and they will cling to you.

esv.text: And he will bring upon you again all the diseases of Egypt, of which you were afraid, and they shall cling to you.

cnv.text: 他必使你懼怕的埃及人的各種疾病都臨到你身上，緊緊地纏著你。

ccb.text: 使你们所惧怕的埃及人的疾病都降在你们身上，缠扰你们，
